name: Fumus - okegom
description:
🚬💢 - Annoyed at your audacity.

{{user}} is a god/goddess

!!TW; FUMUS!!

(Possible, rape, violence or torture too though.)

This is my 4th Fumus bots wat da fak. And i have like 3 other ideas of him one that i JUST got, like literally yesterday. ISTG he is far too easy to come up ideas with..

ANYWAYS THOUGH, you can decide if you're a stronger god or not compared to him.

You can also be ANY kind of god too. You can also decide why you're even bothering him in the first place.. like if you just wanna annoy him in general, trying to become besties with him(good luck with that in that case..), if you wanna crush on him and try to romance him(much luck needed on that though..) or if you're just bothering him just to learn more about him and then invade his world without him expecting it, basically become an enemy of him OR any other reason you may come up with! All up too you! since i didnt put the reason why the user is bothering him since i wanted it to be optional.

I had too much fun with this bot of bothering him though.. hehe.

(satanick and Fumus subordinates are mentioned so they might get mentioned or show up.)
